default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the Evolution CRM launch plan and user profile.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Launch Target:** April 14, 2026, to align with the Evo Week event.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [**Product Model:** Launching as a free, self-hosted Community version (VPS app), mirroring EvoGo and Evo API. A SaaS model is a future phase.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [**User Profile:** The target user is a "prosumer" (e.g., agency owner, consultant)—logical but non-technical—who needs a simplified setup.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [**Resources:** Full documentation (user guide, API reference) and a marketing site are available to support the launch.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)

## Topics

### Product & Launch Strategy

  - [**Product Model:** The initial launch is a free, self-hosted Community version for VPS.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This mirrors the successful EvoGo and Evo API launch strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [A SaaS model with revenue share is planned as a future phase.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [**Launch Timeline:** The target launch date is April 14, 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This date aligns with the start of the Evo Week event (April 14–20).](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
      - [**Dependency:** A testable version is required by this week's end (March 27) to enable development and marketing work.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)

### User Profile & Use Cases

  - [**Target User:** The primary audience is a "prosumer"—logical but non-technical.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
      - [**Profile:** Often an agency owner or consultant who builds automations for clients.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This profile informed the product's simplified setup and guided tutorials.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [**Use Cases:** The platform supports a wide range of applications.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
      - [**Core Functions:** Lead activation, sales pipeline management, follow-ups, and cart recovery.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
      - [**Target Verticals:** Digital marketing (affiliates), legal consulting, and clinics.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
      - [**Advanced Applications:** Contract analysis (legal) and specialized AI agents.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)

### Simplified Setup & Onboarding

  - [**Problem:** Previous products required manual file edits for configuration, which was a barrier for non-technical users.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [**Solution:** Evo CRM features a fully in-platform configuration wizard.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This eliminates the need for manual file edits, making the product accessible to the target prosumer audience.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [**Onboarding:** The wizard will be supplemented with guided tutorials and video walkthroughs.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Davidson:**](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
      - [Provide a testable version of Evo CRM by the end of this week (March 27).](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
      - [Resend the Docker setup template to Eduarda's team.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**Eduarda:**](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [Create an internal launch plan with deadlines for all teams (copy, LP, dev).](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [Coordinate with Fabiano on the LP strategy before his vacation.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [**Pedro:**](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [Begin developing the launch copy and strategy, focusing on the prosumer profile and key use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/e38sowUYUxs19VNg89cq8ABDUNJyK8zs?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)

action_items.description: Deploy Evo CRM test instance; share access w/ Ana, Eduarda, Thiago, Pedro
Create/update WhatsApp group; set deadlines for PMM (LP), Dev (VPS), Fabiano (strategy)
Resend Docker/VPS setup template to Eduarda in WhatsApp
